title: Italian Flatbread with Bresaola
description: A simple and flavorful flatbread topped with thinly sliced bresaola and a hint of Italian herbs. Perfect as a snack or light meal.
instructions: Slice the bresaola into thin strips.
Place the flatbread on a baking sheet.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with Italian seasoning.
Top the flatbread with sliced bresaola.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Bake for 8-10 minutes, or until the flatbread is crispy and the bresaola is heated through.
Garnish with chopped parsley, if desired.
